name: Treasure Hunt
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, card_selection, draw, restricted_tutor, selection, tutor
oracleText: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card, then put all cards revealed this way into your hand.

name: Faithless Looting
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, card_selection, direct_draw, draw, graveyard_support, selection
oracleText: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

name: Electrolyze
oracleText: Electrolyze deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets. Draw a card.

name: Feast of Blood
oracleText: Cast this spell only if you control two or more Vampires. Destroy target creature. You gain 4 life.

name: Arrest
oracleText: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

name: Consume Spirit
actualAnalyzerRoles: direct_finisher, finisher, lifegain, mana_sink, removal, scalable_spell, targeted_removal
oracleText: Spend only black mana on X. Consume Spirit deals X damage to any target and you gain X life.

name: Standstill
oracleText: When a player casts a spell, sacrifice this enchantment. If you do, each of that player's opponents draws three cards.

name: Breath of Malfegor
oracleText: Breath of Malfegor deals 5 damage to each opponent.

name: Turnabout
oracleText: Choose artifact, creature, or land. Tap all untapped permanents of the chosen type target player controls, or untap all tapped permanents of that type that player controls.

name: Voidmage Husher
oracleText: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) When this creature enters, counter target activated ability. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.) Whenever you cast a spell, you may return this creature to its owner's hand.

name: Ogre Arsonist
oracleText: When this creature enters, destroy target land.

name: Corrupt
oracleText: Corrupt deals damage to any target equal to the number of Swamps you control. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.

name: High Tide
manualNotes: Covered by Fallen Empires role audit.
oracleText: Until end of turn, whenever a player taps an Island for mana, that player adds an additional {U}.

name: Gaze of Granite
oracleText: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value X or less.

name: Wash Out
oracleText: Return all permanents of the color of your choice to their owners' hands.

name: Acquire
oracleText: Search target opponent's library for an artifact card and put that card onto the battlefield under your control. Then that player shuffles.

name: Duress
manualNotes: Covered by Media and Collaboration Promos role audit.
oracleText: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
